titleStmt.title: SII 22.168: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 168. (A.R. No. 168 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, ELVĀNĀŚŪR. GRĀMĀRDHANĀTHA TEMPLE—IN THE SAME PLACE. VIKRAMA-CHŌḶA—4th YEAR (A.D. 1121-22).

summary.p: The inscription begins with introduction Pūmādu puṇara etc. It states that while the king was seated on his throne Śēdirājaṉ in the hall called Rājēndraśōḻaṉ in the inner courtyard of his palace at Muḍigoṇḍaśōḻapuram, (the chief or officer) Vāṇakōvaraiyar represented to him that the māḍai equivalent of paddy from the tax-free dēvadāna at Parundal was not specified in the earlier document (recorded in No. 167 above). It was therefore now ordered by the king that the defect be rectified, as a result of which the māḍai was settled to be paid at 169 and odd to the temple (every year) with the extent and boundaries of the land clearly defined.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmātu puṇara puvimātu vaḷara nāmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa taṉ nirupatumalar maṉnavar cūṭa maṉniya Urimaiyāl maṇimuṭi cūṭic ceṅkolceṉṟu ticaitoṟu maḷippa veṅkalinikki meyyaṟan=taḻaippa kaliṅkam Iriya kaṭalmalai naṭātti valaṅkoḷāḻi varaiyūḻi naṭātti Irucuṭaraḷavum Orukuṭai niḻaṟṟa mukkok kiḻānaṭikaḷoṭu
m viṟṟirun=taruḷiya kopparakecaripatmarāṉa tribhuvaṉa cakravattikaḷ śrīvik kiramacoḻadevaṟkku yāṇṭu 4Āvatu nāḷ 3 100 3 10- nāl muṭikoṇṭa coḻapurattuk koyiliṉ Uḷḷālai Āṭṭattu veḷimelai maṇṭapam rājentracoḻanil cetirājanil Eḻun=taruḷiiruntu ceyyat tiruvā
ymoḻin=taruḷinapaṭi malāṭāṉa jananātavaḷanāṭṭup pāṉūṟkkūṟṟattu brahmadeyam Iṟaiyāṉaraiyūrāna coḻakeraḷac caruppetimaṅkalattu Ūrpākaṅ koṇṭaruḷina mahādevaṟkkuk kiḻāṟṟukkūṟṟattupparun=til veṟupiṟittu mutalāna tevatāna Iṟaiyili Iṭṭa mā
ṭai pecāte nirnilamākap peci nirnilattukku velikku I 7 10 ḷa-mākavum puncey nilam veli 1- kku I 3 10 ḷa-mākavum Iṟaikaṭṭi Iṭṭateṉṟu Ivvūrkku nilamaḷavillaiyeṉṟum Ippaṭitavira Iṉṉilam Uṭppaṭap parun=tal Ūruṭaiya tevatāṉa Iṟaiyi
liyāy malaiyaviccātiranallūrennum piyarākap peṟaveṇumeṉṟu vāṇa kovaraiyar namakkuc conṉamaiyilk kiḻāṟṟukkūṟṟattil parun=talil muṉpu tevatāna Iṟaiyiliyāy malaiyaviccātiraṉallūrenṉum piyarāle piṟin=ta nirnilam patiṟṟu
veliyum punceyṉilam patiṟṟuveliyum Āka nilam Irupatiṟṟuvelikku nirnilattu veli 1- kku I 7 10 ḷa-m Ākavum punceyṉilam veli 1- kku I 3 10- ḷamākavum Iṟaikaṭṭinapaṭi tavirttu Innilam Uṭppaṭa Ivvūr māṭai 100 6 10 9va �- m tavirttu malai
yaviccātiranallūrennum piyarāṉa Ivvūrkkuk kiḻpāṟkkellai Eḻuvat tūr Ellaikkum tirupparellaikkum meṟkkum teṉpāṟkkellai meṟppaṭiyūrellaik kum putukkaḻaṉi Ellaikkum koṭṭaiyūrellaikku vaṭakkum melpāṟ
kkellai meṟppaṭiyūrellaikkum ciṟuṉāvalū rellaikkum puttūrppāṭi Ellaikkum kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkkellai ṉeṭumāṉūrellaikkum puttamaṅkalat tellaik kut teṟkkum Ivvicaitta nāṉkellaiyuḷakappaṭṭa ṉilamuṟṟum Idevaṟkku ve
ṇṭum niman=taṅkaḷukku Iṟuppatāka yāṇṭu 4Āvatumutal An=tarāyam Uṭppaṭa tevatāna Iṟaiyili Iṭṭukkuṭuppatu Ippaṭi tiruvāy moḻintaruḷina maikku Ivai paravaināṭṭu veḷān Eḻuttu yāṇṭu 4 ḷ 3 100 4 10 2- nāl tevatāna Iṟaiyili nilai ninṟamaikku Iṭṭapaṭikku [*.] milāṭāna jananātavaḷanāṭ
ṭup pāṉūrkkūṟṟattu brahmadeyam Iṟaiyāṉaraiyūrāna(raiyūrāṉa) coḻa keraḷaccaruppetimaṅkalattu Ūrpākaṅkoṇṭaruḷiṉa devaṟkkuk kiḻārāṟṟuk kūṟṟat tupparun=talil muṉpu devatāna Iṟaiyiliyāy veṟupiṟin=ta malaiyaviccātirinallūr ṉir nilam 10 veliyum pu
ncey nilam 10 veliyum Āka nilam 2 10 velikku nirnilam veli 1- kku I 7 10 ḷa-mum puncey veli 1- kku ḷa 3 10 ḷa-mum Ākavum Iṟaikaṭṭiṉapaṭi tavirttu Iṉnilam Uṭppaṭa Idevarkku veṇṭu niman=taṅkaḷukku Iṟuppatāka An=tarāyamum pāṭṭamum Uṭppaṭa devatāna Iṟai
yili Iṭṭa parun=talāṉa malaiyaviccātirinallūr māṭai 100 6 10�-m yāṇṭu 4vatu An=tarāyam pāṭṭam Uṭppaṭa devataāṉa Iṟaiyili nilainiṉṟamaikkum Iṭṭamaikkum puravaritiṇaikkaḷattu mukaveṭṭi nākaṅ koṟṟaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai puravari tiṇaikkaḷanāyakam Ulaṟṟū
rṉāṭṭuveḷāṉ Eḻuttu puravari tiṇaikkaḷanāyakam paṉṟimaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu puravari tiṇaikkaḷanāyakam veḷūrkiḻavaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Ulakaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai puravari tiṇaikkaḷattuk komuḻāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai puravari tiṇaik kaḷattu mukaveṭṭi kuḷattuḻāṉ Eḻuttu I
tu can=tirātittavaṟ panmāheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 22.168 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
